name: Ninja Art: Erotic Mist Kiss
statusOutcome: As [AttackerName] keeps [TargetName] locked in a deep kiss, [AttackerHeOrShe] suddenly purses [AttackerHisOrHer] lips and breathes out a thick pink mist directly into [TargetName]'s mouth!|n|As the mist fills [TargetName]'s lungs and senses, [TargetHeOrShe] shivers as the aphrodisiac takes hold!
statusMiss: As [AttackerName] keeps [TargetName] locked in a deep kiss, [AttackerHeOrShe] suddenly purses [AttackerHisOrHer] lips and tries to breathe out a thick pink mist directly into [TargetName]'s mouth, but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to shut her mouth in time and hold [TargetHisOrHer] breath!
